revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-5-235

a light illuminating a very narrow sector, used to mark a direction to be followed. This sector may be flanked by sectors of greatly reduced intensity or by sectors of different colour or character. 

[[Image:Direction_light_2.png|400px|border]]
